architectureDecision.label: Two-phase protection cutover
architectureDecision.rationale: PR1 adds ci-result as reporting; PR2 flips required checks after aggregator proven on real PRs.

readyReview.decision: Two-phase branch protection; required checks ci-result plus test and release leafs on shipping contexts.

technicalBreakdown: Add changes classifier job and ci-result aggregator to ci.yml.
Phase 1: ci-result visible but not sole required check; document skip behavior.
Phase 2 follow-up: update branch protection to require ci-result per CI-1 inventory.
Prove evidence/status-only paths skip expensive jobs without false failures.

acceptanceCriteria: Evidence/status-only changes do not start expensive validation jobs.
ci-result succeeds when selected jobs pass or no validation required; fails on unexpected cancel/failure.
Skip decisions visible in workflow summary; two-phase protection cutover documented.
Final state: branch protection requires ci-result plus agreed test/release leaf checks.
